response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates extensive fullstack development experience with strong proficiency in TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-compatible databases, aligning well with the role's requirements. His background in energy and GIS platforms, coupled with his pragmatic approach to scalable architectures and team collaboration, makes him a highly suitable candidate. The minor concern is his limited direct experience with Nest.js, though his adaptability with frameworks suggests quick learning.
strengths: Extensive fullstack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB/SQL databases
Proven track record in building scalable platforms (e.g., GISCollective, Direct Mail automation at Optilyz)
Strong focus on clean architecture, testing (TDD, CI/CD), and team collaboration
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (though proficient in similar frameworks like Express)
Most recent roles emphasize backend/AI-agent infrastructure rather than frontend-heavy tasks
Geographic preference for high on-site presence may not align with Berlin-based roles
